chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Muhammad<sup>asws </sup>(11th Imam<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (387/ 3)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (387/ 3)
text: كُنْتُ مَعَ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي صَحْنِ دَارِهِ فَمَرَّ بِنَا مُحَمَّدٌ ابْنُهُ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ هَذَا صَاحِبُنَا بَعْدَكَ فَقَالَ لَا صَاحِبُكُمْ بَعْدِيَ الْحَسَنُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Ja’far Bin Muhammad Al Kufy, from Bashhar Bin Ahmad Al Basry, from Ali Bin Umar Al Nowfaly who said,

‘I was with Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> in the courtyard of his<sup>asws</sup> house, so Muhammad his<sup>asws</sup> son passed by us. So I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! This one would be our Master after you<sup>asws</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No. Your Master<sup>asws</sup> after me<sup>asws</sup> is Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ja‘far ibn Muhammad al-Kufi from Bashshar ibn Ahmad al-Basri from Ali ibn ‘Umar al-Nawfali who has said the following. “Once I was with abu al-Hassan in the compound of his house and at that time his son, Muhammad passed by. I said to him, “may Allah take my souls in service for your cause, will he be our master, Imam, after you?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “ No, your master, Imam, after me will be al-Hassan (a.s.).” * This abu Ja‘far Muhammad ibn Ali, is the eldest son of the Imam al-Hadi (a.s.).He died before his father (230/845 - 252/866). His shrine is near Balad which is near Baghdad, and the place is now known as al-Sayyid Muhammad. In the following ahadith his name is frequently mentioned.
